settings.hero_subtitle: Pure, natural incense crafted from sacred botanicals. Each stick carries the essence of ancient Indian rituals.
settings.content_body: For millennia, burning incense has been the soul of Indian ritual. Our Agarbatti are rolled by hand using centuries-old methods, blending pure resins, flowers, and sacred woods into a fragrance that transforms any space into a sanctuary.
settings.cta_title: Transform Your Space into a Sacred Sanctuary
settings.cta_subtitle: Let the ancient fragrance of pure incense fill your home, your prayers, and your moments of quiet.
